subjects.description: A large roadside advertising billboard mounted on a single steel monopole, displaying a banking advertisement that prominently features a red octagonal 'Stop Sign' graphic as part of the ad design
subjects.appearance_details: Rectangular billboard panel glossy but dust-filmed under hazy light; blue-and-white banking branding, a bold red stop-sign illustration and white promo text clear against the sand tones; monopole above the flat rooftops
subjects.relationship: The primary point of interest the ego vehicle passes; positioned beyond the right kerb, distinct from any real traffic signage
subjects.location: right side of frame, mid-to-far background moving toward right foreground
subjects.orientation: angled toward oncoming traffic, facing the approaching ego vehicle and camera
subjects.pose: static, elevated upright on the monopole above the arterial kerb
subjects.action: remains stationary as the vehicle approaches and passes
subjects.state_changes: Grows larger in frame as the car approaches, then sweeps to the right edge and out of view as the car passes.

subjects.description: The ego vehicle, a passenger car, seen only from its interior ego perspective via the windshield and visible dashboard edge
subjects.appearance_details: Glossy dashboard under warm hazy light, fine dust film on the windshield, dark hood nose at the bottom of frame
subjects.relationship: The viewpoint vehicle driving down the arterial road past the billboard
subjects.location: implied at camera position, hood visible in bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: facing forward down the arterial road, away from camera
subjects.action: driving steadily along the lane without slowing
subjects.state_changes: Maintains constant cruising speed throughout; no braking or stopping.

background_setting: A broad Middle-Eastern arterial road at the desert's edge under a hazy midday sky, fine dust softening the light and the low sand-colored buildings, palms, and roadside walls. The dry asphalt carries a thin film of blown sand over faded lane paint; a few scattered palms and dusty medians line the route. Beyond the right kerb a billboard stands on a monopole above the flat rooftops, the desert haze paling the far distance.

lighting.conditions: Hazy bright midday with light airborne dust
lighting.direction: High sun diffused through dust haze
lighting.shadows: Soft-edged, moderately short shadows muted by the haze
lighting.illumination_effect: Warm, slightly hazy diffuse light with a sandy glow; distance pales into dust while the red stop-sign graphic stays clear against the sand tones

aesthetics.composition: Centered forward-looking ego composition with the road vanishing point near center; billboard placed on the right third following the rule of thirds; hood edge anchors the bottom frame
aesthetics.color_scheme: Warm sand and ochre buildings, pale hazy sky, dusty asphalt, muted palm green, with red stop sign and blue-white ad accents
aesthetics.patterns: Scattered palms, low flat rooftops, and dust-softened lane paint

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward tracking shot from the moving vehicle's perspective
cinematography.focus: Sharp on the road and billboard; dust haze pales the far distance

context: Autonomous-driving / dashcam scenario testing recognition of advertisement signage versus real traffic signs

actions.description: The ego vehicle cruises forward along the hazy desert-edge arterial; the billboard appears small in the right background ahead through the dust.
The billboard grows larger as the car approaches, its banking ad and red stop sign graphic becoming clearly legible against the sand tones.
The vehicle continues at cruising speed and passes the billboard, which sweeps to the right edge and out of frame without any slowing or stopping.

text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Bold white uppercase lettering on a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, printed as part of the advertisement
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard at right side of frame, clearly visible from 0:02 to 0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Decorative element within the banking advertisement, not a real traffic control sign

text_and_signage_elements.text: STOP OVERPAYING — SWITCH YOUR BANK TODAY
text_and_signage_elements.appearance: Clean blue and white sans-serif promotional text alongside a bank logo
text_and_signage_elements.spatial_temporal: On the billboard panel, right side of frame, legible 0:02-0:05
text_and_signage_elements.context: Banking advertisement slogan promoting a financial service

segments.description: Ego vehicle drives steadily along the desert-edge arterial under hazy sun; billboard small in the dusty distance on the right above flat rooftops.
segments.key_changes: Billboard begins to grow as distance closes.
segments.camera: Forward tracking from the moving car, stable.

segments.description: Approach phase as the billboard enlarges and the banking ad with the stop sign becomes clearly readable against the sand tones.
segments.key_changes: Ad text and red stop sign graphic become legible.
segments.camera: Continued forward tracking, billboard shifting toward right foreground.

segments.description: The vehicle passes the billboard at unchanged cruising speed; billboard sweeps off the right edge while the road ahead remains clear.
segments.key_changes: Billboard exits frame; vehicle does not slow or stop.
segments.camera: Forward tracking continues smoothly past the billboard.

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the camera looks down a broad desert-edge arterial under hazy midday light, sand-colored buildings and palms flanking the road and a billboard small in the right distance. By 0:01 the car holds steady cruising speed. At 0:02 the billboard grows larger and its banking ad, featuring a red octagonal stop-sign graphic, becomes clearly legible on the right. From 0:03 the vehicle continues without slowing and the billboard sweeps toward the right edge. By 0:04-0:05 it passes out of view into the dust haze while the road ahead stays open, the car never braking.
audio_description: Low engine hum and tire noise on sandy asphalt, warm dry wind and faint distant city sounds; no speech or music.
